title: rosa canina f. stohlii
intro: Rosa canina f. stohlii, also known as the Stohlii dog rose or Stohlii wild rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina plant species. This perennial shrub is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rosa canina f. stohlii include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions and skin issues.
